testcase.name: testPublishPriorityUpdated_exceptionHandled
testcase.system-out: 10:18:16.326 [main] ERROR com.loyalty.service_admin.infrastructure.messaging.DiscountLimitPriorityEventAdapter -- Failed to publish DISCOUNT_PRIORITY_UPDATED event: priorityId=45609c14-ebdd-443a-beca-94a9485a182d, ecommerceId=aa371b00-1fe5-47bb-9343-86f8274e28be java.lang.RuntimeException: error at
